zh.lifeSummary: 當Urian Egerton於大約1308年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親David de Egerton33歲，母親Isabella Fulleshurst32歲。他於大約1352年與Amelia De Warburton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年在他的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Urian Egerton于大约1308年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，他的父亲David de Egerton33岁，母亲Isabella Fulleshurst32岁。他于大约1352年与Amelia De Warburton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年在他的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Urian Egerton was born about 1308, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, David de Egerton, was 33 and his mother, Isabella Fulleshurst, was 32. He married Amelia De Warburton about 1352, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Urian Egerton est né environ 1308, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David d’Egerton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabella Fulleshurst, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Amelia De Warburton environ 1352, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Urian Egerton um 1308 in Egerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Egerton 33 und seine Mutter Isabella Fulleshurst 32. Er hat um 1352 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Amelia De Warburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1396 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Urian Egerton è nato il circa 1308 nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, David de Egerton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Fulleshurst, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Amelia De Warburton circa 1352, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Urian Egertonが約1308年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父David de Egertonは33歳，母Isabella Fulleshurstは32歳であった。約1352年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAmelia De Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Urian Egerton(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Egerton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Fulleshurst(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Amelia De Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Urian Egerton nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David de Egerton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Fulleshurst, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Amelia De Warburton aproximadamente 1352, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Urian Egerton родился около 1308 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени David de Egerton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Fulleshurst, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Amelia De Warburton около 1352 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Urian Egerton nació aproximadamente 1308, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, David de Egerton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabella Fulleshurst, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Amelia De Warburton aproximadamente 1352, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
